evals.prompt: Package ./feishu-docs-vscode-skill as a public skill named feishu-docs-vscode with capability feishu for both Codex and Claude Code.
evals.expected_output: A clean package with README, LICENSE, .gitignore, platform-specific skill folders, references, evals, installation instructions, and no private local artifacts.

evals.prompt: Package ./private-note-workflow as a private skill named private-note-workflow for Claude Code only.
evals.expected_output: A private package with README, safety notes, Claude Code skill files, references as needed, and no public repository assumptions.
